executives.name: Paul Murphy
executives.background: Mr. Murphy is the Chairman of the Board. He was previously a partner at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP where he served as the National Mining Leader in Canada.

tenure_dates.title: Independent Director, Chair of the Audit Committee
